description: Myanmar Mahabote 8 Directions Data (八方位詳細資料)
source: Traditional Mahabote (မဟာဘုတ်) ancient texts

omens.career: 領導力強，適合開創事業，有貴人扶持。
omens.career_en: Strong leadership, suitable for entrepreneurship, supported by benefactors.
omens.marriage: 婚姻光明，伴侶忠誠，但需避免過於強勢。
omens.marriage_en: Bright marriage, loyal partner, but avoid being too domineering.
omens.health: 精力充沛，心臟與視力需注意保養。
omens.health_en: Energetic, but heart and vision need attention.

omens.career: 才華橫溢，適合文學、藝術、教育領域。
omens.career_en: Talented, suitable for literature, arts, and education.
omens.marriage: 感情豐富，婚姻和諧，但情緒波動需控制。
omens.marriage_en: Rich in emotions, harmonious marriage, but emotional swings need control.
omens.health: 消化系統與水分代謝需留意，情緒影響健康。
omens.health_en: Digestive system and fluid metabolism need attention; emotions affect health.

directions.dir_myanmar: အရှေ့တောင်

omens.career: 勇猛果敢，軍警、運動、競爭型事業有利。
omens.career_en: Brave and decisive; favorable for military, sports, competitive careers.
omens.marriage: 性格剛烈，婚姻需忍讓，易有口角衝突。
omens.marriage_en: Strong temperament; marriage requires patience, prone to arguments.
omens.health: 血液循環與外傷需防範，火氣旺盛。
omens.health_en: Blood circulation and injuries need attention; excess heat.

omens.career: 智商高，適合商業、通訊、寫作、學術。
omens.career_en: High intelligence; suitable for business, communications, writing, academia.
omens.marriage: 善於溝通，但需避免口舌是非影響感情。
omens.marriage_en: Good communicator, but beware of gossip affecting relationships.
omens.health: 神經系統與呼吸道較弱，需防過勞。
omens.health_en: Nervous system and respiratory tract are weak; avoid overwork.

directions.dir_myanmar: အနောက်တောင်

omens.career: 命運多舛但深具靈性，適合宗教、玄學、醫療。
omens.career_en: Turbulent fate but deep spirituality; suitable for religion, occult, medicine.
omens.marriage: 婚姻考驗多，需培養信任與耐心。
omens.marriage_en: Many marriage trials; cultivate trust and patience.
omens.health: 體質較弱，需防不明疾病與精神壓力。
omens.health_en: Weak constitution; beware of unexplained illness and mental stress.

omens.career: 智慧與福報兼具，適合教育、法律、宗教。
omens.career_en: Wisdom and blessings combined; suitable for education, law, religion.
omens.marriage: 婚姻美滿，伴侶賢德，子女孝順。
omens.marriage_en: Happy marriage, virtuous partner, filial children.
omens.health: 肝膽系統需注意，整體福壽綿長。
omens.health_en: Liver and gallbladder need attention; overall long and blessed life.

directions.dir_myanmar: အနောက်မြောက်

omens.career: 藝術才華出眾，適合設計、音樂、時尚、外交。
omens.career_en: Outstanding artistic talent; suitable for design, music, fashion, diplomacy.
omens.marriage: 桃花旺盛，婚姻甜蜜，但需防爛桃花。
omens.marriage_en: Strong romantic luck, sweet marriage, but beware of unwanted suitors.
omens.health: 腎臟與泌尿系統需注意，享樂過度損健康。
omens.health_en: Kidney and urinary system need attention; excess pleasure harms health.

omens.career: 刻苦耐勞，大器晚成，適合建築、農業、礦業。
omens.career_en: Hardworking and enduring; late bloomer; suitable for construction, agriculture, mining.
omens.marriage: 婚姻來遲但穩固，需耐心等待良緣。
omens.marriage_en: Marriage comes late but is stable; need patience waiting for the right partner.
omens.health: 骨骼與關節需注意，晚年養生重要。
omens.health_en: Bones and joints need attention; health maintenance in old age is important.
